name: Build a modern, visually stunning gaming
prompt: Build a modern, visually stunning gaming website.  Website Name: Apex Gaming Hub  Goal: Create a complete gaming platform homepage that showcases games, news, and community features.  Design Requirements: - Dark theme (black + neon blue/purple accents) - Futuristic UI with glowing effects - Smooth animations and hover effects - Fully responsive (mobile + desktop)  Sections to include:  1. Hero Section - Big headline: "Enter the Ultimate Gaming Universe" - Subtext: "Discover, play, and dominate" - Background: animated or gradient gaming-style - Call-to-action button: "Explore Games"  2. Featured Games Section - Grid of game cards (with images) - Each card shows:   - Game name   - Genre   - Play button  3. Latest Gaming News - 3–5 news cards - Title, short description, read more button  4. Categories - Action, RPG, FPS, Racing, Esports - Icon-based layout  5. Community Section - Show player stats, online users, leaderboard preview  6. Footer - Social links - About - Contact  Technical Requirements: - Clean HTML, CSS, and JavaScript - Use modern UI styling (glassmorphism or neon glow) - Add subtle animations (hover, transitions) - No external dependencies unless necessary  Make it look like a real gaming platform (similar to Steam or Epic Games).
